title: Bio-Techne Corporation: Long-Term Quality, But At A Price
text: Bio-Techne Corporation has been a long term value creator, combining organic growth with sound M&A deals. This has resulted in long-term value creation, as Bio-Techne Corporation shares have looked pricey for a long time.

title: EXOSOME DIAGNOSTICS RELEASES INTERIM RESULTS FROM CLINICAL STUDY OF PROSTATE CANCER RISK TEST
text: Halfway through 5-year study, ExoDx Prostate Test offers more accurate stratification of high- and low-risk patients compared to standard of care MINNEAPOLIS , May 18, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Bio-Techne Corporation (NASDAQ: TECH) today announced that Exosome Diagnostics, a Bio-Techne brand, has reported interim results from a previously published prospective, randomized study of more than 1,000 patients aimed at evaluating the clinical utility of the ExoDx™ Prostate Test over a 5-year follow-up period. This study adds to the body of published evidence on the ExoDx Prostate Test.

title: PBYI vs. TECH: Which Stock Is the Better Value Option?
text: Investors looking for stocks in the Medical - Biomedical and Genetics sector might want to consider either Puma Biotech (PBYI) or Techne (TECH). But which of these two companies is the best option for those looking for undervalued stocks?

title: BIO-TECHNE COMMERCIALIZES RNASCOPE SPATIAL BIOLOGY WORKFLOW FOR THE STANDARD BIOTOOLS HYPERION IMAGING SYSTEM
text: Enabling Bio-Techne's gold-standard RNAscope ISH technology with Imaging Mass Cytometry detection to accelerate multiomic interrogation of health and disease. MINNEAPOLIS , May 16, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Bio-Techne (NASDAQ: TECH), a global life sciences company providing innovative tools and bioactive reagents for the research and clinical diagnostic communities today announced the expansion of the Advanced Cell Diagnostics (ACD)-branded RNAscope™ in situ hybridization (ISH) portfolio with the release of a RNAscope multiomic workflow for the Standard BioTools Hyperion™ Imaging System.

title: BIO-TECHNE TO PRESENT AT THE 2023 RBC CAPITAL MARKETS GLOBAL HEALTHCARE CONFERENCE
text: MINNEAPOLIS , May 12, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Bio-Techne Corporation (NASDAQ: TECH) today announced that Jim Hippel, Executive Vice President and Chief Financial Officer, will present at the 2023 RBC Capital Markets Global Healthcare Conference on Tuesday, May 16, 2023, at 2:35 p.m. EDT. A live webcast of the presentation can be accessed via the IR Calendar page of Bio-Techne's Investor Relations website at https://investors.bio-techne.com/ir-calendar.

title: BIO-TECHNE ANNOUNCES LAUNCH OF KAPPA AND LAMBDA RNAscope ISH PROBES AS ANALYTE SPECIFIC REAGENTS (ASRs) FOR THE DETECTION OF IMMUNOGLOBULIN KAPPA AND LAMBDA LIGHT CHAINS mRNA
text: MINNEAPOLIS , May 10, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Bio-Techne (NASDAQ: TECH), a global life sciences company providing innovative tools and bioactive reagents for the research and clinical diagnostic communities today announced the launch of two new RNAscope™ in situ Hybridization Probes Kappa and Lambda as analyte specific reagents (ASRs) for the detection of immunoglobulin kappa and lambda light chains mRNA in B-cells. Detection of B-cell clonality is useful for identification of monoclonal B-cell populations which are often associated with a malignancy.

title: Bio-Techne Corporation (TECH) Q3 2023 Earnings Call Transcript
text: Bio-Techne Corporation (NASDAQ:TECH ) Q3 2023 Earnings Conference Call May 3, 2023 9:00 AM ET Company Participants David Clair – Vice President-Investor Relations Chuck Kummeth – Chief Executive Officer Jim Hippel – Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Puneet Souda – SVB Securities Jacob Johnson – Stephens Dan Arias – Stifel Dan Leonard – Credit Suisse Patrick Donnelly – Citi Catherine Schulte – Baird Justin Bowers – Deutsche Bank Alex Nowak – Craig-Hallum Operator Good day, and welcome to the Bio-Techne Corp Third Quarter Fiscal 2023 Earnings Call. All participants will be in a listen-only mode.

title: Techne (TECH) Meets Q3 Earnings Estimates
text: Techne (TECH) came out with quarterly earnings of $0.53 per share, in line with the Zacks Consensus Estimate. This compares to earnings of $0.54 per share a year ago.

title: BIO-TECHNE RELEASES THIRD QUARTER FISCAL 2023 RESULTS
text: MINNEAPOLIS , May 3, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- Bio-Techne Corporation (NASDAQ: TECH) today reported its financial results for the third quarter ended March 31, 2023. Third Quarter FY2023 Highlights Third quarter organic revenue increased by 3% (1% reported) to $294.1 million and 4% (2% reported) in the first nine months of fiscal 2023 to $835.4 million.
